name: orbitfs
description: Mobile-first admin panel for the OrbitFS MCP server - full file control plus service monitoring/restart, so there's no reason to RDP into the VPS.

scripts.test: node --check server.js && node --check setup.js && node --check license.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/addon-manager.js && node --check "plugins/OrbitFS Sorter/server.js" && node test-license.mjs && node test-license-ui.mjs
